name: ds4cc
description: Read-only guidance for discovering reviewed DS4CC plugins and installing them with Grok Build, Codex, Claude Code, Copilot, or Kimi Code after source review.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and install DS4CC marketplace plugins across Grok, Codex, Claude, Copilot, Kimi Code
interface.longDescription: Meta-plugin documenting how to register the DS4CC marketplace and install plugins on Grok Build (paste-friendly), Codex CLI, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, and Kimi Code CLI. Does not auto-install.
